display.purpose: The page title in the masthead strip; the single largest voice on a surface.

title.purpose: Section and panel headings, and empty-state titles.

body.purpose: Labels, descriptions, applicant names, and cell prose.

data.purpose: Every machine-read value — IDs, dates, counts, confidence — set in Geist Mono with tabular-nums.

label.purpose: Uppercase column headers and sidebar section markers only (the .register-label utility).

shadows.name: xs
shadows.purpose: Faintest lift; hairline separation for small controls.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Quiet lift for small raised media (empty-state tile, raised avatars).

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: The primary action on hover, and mid-weight raised surfaces.

shadows.name: primary
shadows.purpose: The indigo-tinted lift under the primary button and the wordmark mark.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Menus, sheets, popovers that genuinely leave the page.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color and elevation state transitions.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/press feedback on buttons, rows, and controls (transition-colors / transition-all).

motion.name: pulse
motion.purpose: The in-progress disposition dot and the running stage-bar cell — the only ambient motion in the system.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one indigo action in a region (e.g. New Verification). Carries the soft indigo lift, deepening on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>New verification</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.505 0.185 266)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.99 0.005 260)); font: 500 14px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.005em; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.30 0.18 266 / 0.30), 0 8px 18px -8px oklch(0.40 0.18 266 / 0.45); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, oklch(0.505 0.185 266)) 90%, black); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0.235 0.02 264 / 0.07), 0 8px 22px -8px oklch(0.235 0.02 264 / 0.16); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.505 0.185 266 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Everything that is not the action — pagination, filters, secondary controls. Surface ground, hairline border, fills muted on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.918 0.005 264)); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.235 0.014 264)); font: 500 12.8px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted, oklch(0.968 0.004 260)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.505 0.185 266 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Register search — surface ground, hairline border, 6px radius, thin leading glyph, mono-friendly for IDs. Focus draws the indigo ring.
components.css: .ds-search { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: 288px; } .ds-search > svg { position: absolute; left: 10px; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.505 0.016 264)); pointer-events: none; } .ds-search-field { width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px 0 32px; border: 1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.885 0.006 264)); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.235 0.014 264)); font: 400 13px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-search-field::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.505 0.016 264)); } .ds-search-field:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.505 0.185 266)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.505 0.185 266 / 0.4); }

components.name: Disposition Mark
components.description: The register's signature stamp: an 8px round dot in the disposition color + the status word in disposition ink, always together. Never color alone; the in-progress dot pulses.
components.css: .ds-disposition { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; line-height: 1; } .ds-disposition-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-disposition-word { font: 500 13px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-disposition--ok .ds-disposition-dot { background: var(--ok, oklch(0.60 0.13 160)); } .ds-disposition--ok .ds-disposition-word { color: var(--ok-ink, oklch(0.45 0.10 160)); } .ds-disposition--issues .ds-disposition-dot { background: var(--issues, oklch(0.68 0.14 74)); } .ds-disposition--issues .ds-disposition-word { color: var(--issues-ink, oklch(0.475 0.10 66)); } .ds-disposition--incomplete .ds-disposition-dot { background: var(--incomplete, oklch(0.60 0.16 32)); } .ds-disposition--incomplete .ds-disposition-word { color: var(--incomplete-ink, oklch(0.465 0.145 30)); } .ds-disposition--failed .ds-disposition-dot { background: var(--failed, oklch(0.55 0.20 26)); } .ds-disposition--failed .ds-disposition-word { color: var(--failed-ink, oklch(0.46 0.185 25)); }

components.name: Stage Bar
components.description: A segmented read of the six-stage pipeline (OCR → Classify → Extract → Completeness → Rules → Report). Completed cells in ink, the running cell pulsing indigo, pending cells hairline — rounded pill segments, never a ring.
components.html: 5/6 · Cross-checks
components.css: .ds-stagebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-stagebar-cells { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; } .ds-cell { width: 15px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-cell--done { background: var(--foreground, oklch(0.235 0.014 264)); } .ds-cell--now { background: var(--primary, oklch(0.505 0.185 266)); animation: ds-pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; } .ds-cell--todo { background: var(--rule, oklch(0.922 0.004 264)); } .ds-stagebar-label { font: 400 12px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.505 0.016 264)); } .ds-stagebar-label .ds-mono { font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.235 0.014 264)); } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } }

components.name: Nav Item (active)
components.description: Sidebar navigation entry. Active: sidebar-accent ground, ink text, a rounded indigo leading pill. Inactive: muted ink, fills sidebar-accent on hover.
components.html: Register
components.css: .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 6px; font: 400 14px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--sidebar-foreground, oklch(0.315 0.014 264)) 80%, transparent); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item > svg { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-nav-item::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 3px; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--sidebar-accent, oklch(0.947 0.017 266)); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: var(--sidebar-accent, oklch(0.947 0.017 266)); color: var(--sidebar-foreground, oklch(0.315 0.014 264)); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { background: var(--primary, oklch(0.505 0.185 266)); }

components.name: Demo Badge
components.description: A pill chip marking demo/illustrative data — surface ground, hairline border, a small round marker dot, muted-ink label.
components.css: .ds-badge-demo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 20px; padding: 0 8px; border: 1px solid var(--rule-strong, oklch(0.868 0.006 264)); border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.505 0.016 264)); font: 500 11px/1 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--issues, oklch(0.68 0.14 74)); }

narrative.overview: AZ-Cadastre is an official register rendered as software, softened toward a contemporary product surface. Every verification package is an entry; the interface is the ruled page it is written on. The world is the Swiss International Typographic tradition — the identity-program language of credible public institutions — now given room to breathe: a cleaner cool-paper canvas over white raised surfaces, a more vivid indigo signal answered by a quiet teal second accent, gently rounded corners, and a measured offset-and-blur elevation reserved for what genuinely lifts off the page. Modern feel, institutional bones. Type does the composing: a single objective grotesk (Geist) for language, a monospace (Geist Mono) for every machine-read value. Numbers are always tabular, because this is a document of record and columns must align down the page. Because the instrument backs a human decision, the world never dramatizes a verdict — disposition is stated in ink-toned status dots paired with words, never celebrated, never color alone.
keyCharacteristics: The page is a ruled register, not a deck of cards.
Hairline rules are the grid; they are structure, not decoration.
Tabular monospace for every ID, date, count, and confidence value.
One indigo signal + a quiet teal accent; disposition ink is always labelled.
Gently rounded, calmly elevated; light ground under the desk-and-daylight scene.
Trilingual by construction (RU / EN / AZ), including Cyrillic.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Registry Indigo carries selection, the primary action, and focus — nowhere else. The teal accent is the only other brand hue, used sparingly for support; disposition inks are their own reserved band. If two indigo things compete for "the action" on a screen, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Status-Never-Alone Rule
rules.body: A disposition is always a marker plus a word. Color never carries meaning by itself — required for the colorblind, and for a document that must survive being printed in grayscale.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Every number a reader might scan or compare down a column — IDs, dates, counts, confidence — is set in Geist Mono with tabular-nums. Prose numbers may stay in the sans.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Sans for language, mono for data. A third face is a defect, not a decision.

rules.name: The Earned-Lift Rule
rules.body: Rows, cells, and rails of the register cast no shadow — they are the flat page. A shadow means the element has risen above the page (the primary action, a menu, a sheet); it is always offset + soft blur, never a flat halo.

rules.name: The Gentle-Radius Rule
rules.body: An 8px base radius runs through the interactive layer — buttons, inputs, toggles, the sidebar trigger, raised media (4/6/8/12px by scale; badges are pills). The register table stays edge-to-edge and ruled: rows and cells are not boxed. Rounded just enough to read current — never a bubbly, over-rounded consumer look.

dos: Do draw structure with hairline rules and the module; let the grid show.
Do set every ID, date, count, and confidence in tabular Geist Mono.
Do keep Registry Indigo scarce — selection, primary action, and focus only.
Do pair every disposition color with a round dot and a word.
Do keep the register flat; reserve real offset+blur lift for the primary action, raised media, and overlays.
Do round the interactive layer gently (4/6/8/12px); keep the table ruled.
Do design every string to translate across RU / EN / AZ and re-flow.
donts: Don't box register rows into floating cards, or over-round toward a bubbly consumer look — the table stays ruled and edge-to-edge.
Don't let the teal accent carry status or crowd the indigo signal, and no decorative chart.
Don't phrase or style any output as an approval, verdict, or recommendation to act — the register reports; the inspector decides.
Don't convey status by color alone, or with a candy-colored pill.
Don't bring in a display serif or a third type voice; two voices only.
